description: Account for Siwan 1494 sel. ca. 1183. This very orderly written list of revenues and expenditures covers the revenue from 18 apartments and compounds, the total being 205 dirhams. The expenditure section lists several ordinary items, but in the main gives details of sums spent on repairs in Dar al-Nagid. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 339 #85)
description_he: חשבון לסיון 1494 לשטרות (כ-1183). הכנסות מ-18 דיירים: 205 דרהם. הוצאות כוללות תיקונים בדאר אל-נגיד.
